description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a glossy black finish accented by gold trim along the lower sides and wheel arches. The hood and roof are adorned with intricate, stylized graphics, adding a unique and artistic flair to its appearance. The car sits low to the ground, with a pronounced fastback roofline that flows smoothly into the rear, emphasizing its sporty character. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with red brake calipers, suggesting high performance. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the body, enhancing the coupe's modern and aggressive look. Subtle branding and detailing are visible near the front fenders, contributing to its premium feel.
description: A sleek black coupe car with gold accents, artistic hood and roof graphics, and a fastback roofline. Large alloy wheels and tinted windows complete its sporty, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive grille, gold-accented headlights, and detailed hood graphics.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gold trim, large alloy wheels, and the smooth fastback roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the taillights, rear bumper, and the continuation of the roof graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible branding near the front fender and gold accents.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
